title: dryopteris longissima
intro: Dryopteris longissima, also known as the Long-leaf Buckler Fern, is a species of fern native to Europe and Asia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. The health benefits of Dryopteris longissima include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
